name: Citrus Marinade and Salsa (for Chicken or Fish)
recipeIngredient: 2 tablespoons Olive oil or cooking oil
Chopped Tomato, peeled, seeded and Chopped Green onion, sliced
recipeInstructions:
1. For marinade, in a 1-cup measure combine lemon juice, sherry, oil, oregano, and garlic salt. Set aside 2 tablespoons.
2. Pour remaining into a plastic bag; add chicken or fish. Close bag; chill for 1 hour, turning once.
3. For salsa, combine the 2 tablespoons marinade, tomato, green onion, olives, parsley, and almonds. Cover; chill until serving time.
4. Drain chicken or fish, reserving marinade.
5. Grill chicken or fish until tender and flaky, turning often and brushing with the marinade.
6. Serve with chilled salsa and avocado slices, if desired.
Nutrition facts per tablespoon salsa: 13 calories, 1 gram total fat (0 grams saturated fat), 0 milligrams cholesterol, 13 milligrams sodium, 1 gram carbohydrates, 0 grams fiber, 0 grams protein. Daily value: 1% vitamin A, 5% vitamin C, 0% calcium, 0% iron.
